_notes.purpose: RE metadata source-of-truth, anchored to constants/AOBs (Path C) not addresses, so it survives ~biweekly LoL recompiles. resolved_address fields are cache/telemetry only, NEVER a key.
_notes.provenance_rule: resolved_address, signature.byte_sig, signature.cfg, vars.db_state, anchors.constants, anchors.runtime_signature = DB-measured. metadata.name/prototype/comment, vars.proposed, role/identity labels = inference.
_notes.anchor_finding: string/reflection-name anchors reach the skin RENDERER side; the CharacterStackData mutation path (0x40e8/0x1314, Update fn) is only reachable by feeding signatures.rs AOBs into search_bytes.
_notes.shared_source_of_truth: signature.byte_sig / anchors.runtime_signature use the same masked-AOB form as WildSkin-rs/src/memory/signatures.rs — the byte pattern is simultaneously the runtime scanner's locator and the BN re-anchor key.

metadata.name: register_GetUnitSkinID
metadata.comment: Static-init registrar: builds name 'GetUnitSkinID' (qword 0x5374696e55746547 = 'GetUnitS' + strncpy 'kinID') and registers accessor fn-ptr sub_1401f65f0 into script-binding registry data_141ed6d50. PROPOSED name; DB has it stripped as sub_1400b3fd0.

db_state.note: No parameter-category vars in DB; effectively void(void). Locals are BN auto-names (var_98,var_68,var_60,var_5c...,result,rax_1,rcx_1).

metadata.name: ApplyRelativeTeamColors_AllSubmeshes
metadata.comment: Per-object team-color apply: iterates model/skin vector at this+0x1370..+0x1378, loads relative team color per entry via sub_1403f4900, logs fmt string on failure, then FAddClassDep + 'Idle1' anim bind. PROPOSED name; DB has it stripped as sub_140e3c940. Sibling single-target variant is sub_14029b400 (shares fmt string).

cfg.loops_note: back-edge count; primary do-while over model vector + 1 inner refcount loop

string_xrefs: Failed to load relative team color for skin: %s and skinID: %i
anchors.string_xref_ambiguous: fmt string alone -> {sub_140e3c940, sub_14029b400}; disambiguated below
anchors.disambiguator: MRE::FAddClassDep + 'Idle1' present here, absent in sibling sub_14029b400
anchors.constants_note: project 0x40e8/0x1314 NOT present in this function

db_state.note: 1 parameter-category var in DB. Remaining are BN auto reg-temporaries (rax_1..rax_16, rcx_1..rcx_12, i, i_1, arg_8...).

last_resolved.score_note: primary fmt-string anchor ambiguous (2 candidates); named-call MRE::FAddClassDep + 'Idle1' string reduce to 1

metadata.name: CharacterDataStack::Update
metadata.comment: THE skin-apply mutation fn. Runtime calls update(true) to apply base_skin.skin. Matches signatures.rs UPDATE_FN_SIG (entry prologue) AND character_data.rs UpdateFn exactly; DB arg count (2: this, change) confirms the ABI. PROPOSED name; DB stripped as sub_140210460.

cfg.note: large/complex fn; block count from full basic-blocks dump. Update is the heavy per-apply routine.

db_state.note: 2 params — matches UpdateFn(this, change:bool). Locals are BN auto temporaries.

metadata.name: CharacterObject_set_model_and_skin
metadata.comment: change_skin-adjacent: references the CharacterDataStack at this+0x40e8 (&arg1[0x81d]) and forwards 17 fields to the emplace/build helper sub_14022aee0. Hosts the 'lea rcx,[rbp+0x40e8]' the runtime scrapes for FieldOffsets.character_data_stack. PROPOSED name/role (not asserted to be change_skin); DB stripped as sub_1402a3a20.

cfg.note: not fetched to avoid a second large dump; HLIL shows 1 primary refcount loop + a submesh iteration loop.

runtime_signature.match: unique (1 hit for the dewildcarded 48 8D 8D E8 40 00 00 44 8B 8C 24)

params.note: 18 params total; arg2..arg18 forwarded to sub_14022aee0

db_state.note: 18 params. Names BN auto; types BN-inferred.

metadata.name: CharacterStackData_field_init
metadata.prototype: uint64_t sub_14026c540(int32_t* out, char* modelA, int32_t* p3, char* modelB, int32_t skin, char gear, void* p7, int32_t p8, int64_t p9)
metadata.comment: CharacterStackData field-initializer/setter. Hosts 'mov [rsi+0x1314],al' — the skin_id byte write the runtime scrapes for FieldOffsets.skin_id. PROPOSED name/role; DB stripped as sub_14026c540.

cfg.note: loops = inlined string-copy self-loops; edges/loops counted from full basic-blocks dump

runtime_signature.match: unique via discriminator; raw '88 86 14 13 00 00' hits 2 fns (sub_14026c540, sub_140334000) but only sub_14026c540 carries '0F B6 45 A8' (sub_140334000 has '0F B6 45 C1')

anchors.constants_note: raw 0x1314 also present at sibling sub_140334000 (rejected by full-sig discriminator)

db_state.note: 9 params. Names BN auto; types BN-inferred.

metadata.name: GameClient_state_probe_host
metadata.comment: Host fn carrying the 'mov rax,[rip+GameClient]' the runtime scrapes for GlobalPointers.game_client (GAME_CLIENT_SIG). This is the sig resolved FIRST in wait_for_game_client: match is the earliest full-pattern hit (an earlier '48 8B F2 83 78' at 0x1405e235e lacks the '48 8B 05' prefix and is skipped). Loads GameClient global slot @0x141EF37E8; runtime then derefs it and calls game_state::is_running. PROPOSED name/role; DB stripped as sub_1406e8610.

cfg.note: not_enumerated to avoid a large dump; entry prologue captured in byte_sig.

runtime_signature.match: 5 raw hits for the dewildcarded run; 4 carry the '48 8B 05 ????' prefix (targets 0x141EF37E8 x3, 0x141ED9F80 x1); scanner takes the FIRST (0x1406e862d, GameClient @0x141EF37E8).

db_state.note: Host fn takes rcx(this)/rdx(p2); rdx moved into rsi at the match (48 8B F2). Locals are BN auto temporaries; full stack layout not enumerated.

metadata.name: LocalPlayer_accessor_host
metadata.comment: Host fn carrying the 'mov rdi,[rip+Player]' the runtime scrapes for GlobalPointers.player (PLAYER_SIG). Match at 0x1402164ba is a null-check idiom (test rdi,rdi; jz; add rdi,0x290) over the Player global @0x141F10390. PROPOSED name/role; DB stripped as sub_1402163f0.

cfg.note: not_enumerated; entry prologue captured in byte_sig. Match site 0x1402164ba is interior, not the entry.

runtime_signature.match: unique (1 hit for the 8-byte run, carries the '48 8B 3D' prefix); loads Player global @0x141F10390.

db_state.note: Interior match; host params not enumerated.

metadata.name: HeroList_iterator_host
metadata.comment: Host fn carrying the 'mov rax,[rip+HeroList]; mov rcx,[rax+8]; ... lea r8,[..rax*8]; cmp; jz' loop the runtime scrapes for GlobalPointers.hero_list (HERO_LIST_SIG). Match at 0x140293ddf loads HeroList global @0x141ED9F18 and iterates the vector. PROPOSED name/role; DB stripped as sub_140293d80.

cfg.note: not_enumerated; entry prologue captured in byte_sig. Match site 0x140293ddf is interior.

runtime_signature.match: earliest full-pattern hit whose '48 8B ? 08' is preceded by a rip global-load; loads HeroList @0x141ED9F18.

db_state.note: Interior match; host params not enumerated.

metadata.name: ChampionManager_index_host
metadata.comment: Host fn carrying 'mov rcx,[rip+ChampionManager]; imul rdx,rax,0x1d8; mov rax,[rip+..]' the runtime scrapes for GlobalPointers.champion_manager (CHAMPION_MANAGER_SIG). Match at 0x140426023 loads ChampionManager global @0x141F15FD8 (0x1d8 element stride). PROPOSED name/role; DB stripped as sub_140425e30.

cfg.note: not_enumerated; entry prologue captured in byte_sig. Match site 0x140426023 is interior.

runtime_signature.match: unique full-pattern hit (only candidate with the '48 8B 0D' prefix); loads ChampionManager @0x141F15FD8.

db_state.note: Interior match; host params not enumerated.

metadata.name: UNRESOLVED_minion_list_host
metadata.comment: MINION_LIST_SIG host NOT resolved this session (honest gap, NOT fabricated). The pattern's longest wildcard-free run is 3 bytes (48 8B 0D / 48 8B 01) and BN search_bytes rejects '?' wildcards, so the long masked AOB (three consecutive '48 8B 0D ???? E8' blocks 12 bytes apart, then 'E8 ???? 48 8B 0D ???? 48 8B 01') could not be located by contiguous sub-run search. Scanned .text regions 0x140290000 / 0x1405a0000 / 0x140600000 / 0x1406e0000 / 0x140380000 for the 12-byte-spaced '48 8B 0D ... E8' triple; not found in those windows. Needs a wildcard-capable scan (feed the full masked AOB through the project's own aobscan) to resolve.

runtime_signature.match: NOT RESOLVED (search_bytes has no wildcard support; see comment)

metadata.name: TurretList_accessor_host
metadata.comment: Host fn carrying 'mov rax,[rip+TurretList]; mov rbx,[rax+0x28]; test rbx,rbx; jz' the runtime scrapes for GlobalPointers.turret_list (TURRET_LIST_SIG). Match at 0x1405a67d5 loads TurretList global @0x141F3AE28 (list at +0x28). PROPOSED name/role; DB stripped as sub_1405a67b0.

cfg.note: all blocks flow forward to sink 0x1405a6830; no back-edges. Match site 0x1405a67d5 is block 4.

runtime_signature.match: sole '48 8B ? 28 48 85 ? 74' site preceded by a rip global-load (all others are pointer null-check idioms); loads TurretList @0x141F3AE28.

db_state.note: rcx(this) preserved into rbx at entry; interior match. Host params not enumerated.

metadata.name: Window_ptr_load_host
metadata.comment: Host fn carrying 'mov rcx,[rip+g1]; call qword[rip+import]; mov rax,[rip+g2]' the runtime scrapes for GlobalPointers.window (WINDOW_SIG). WINDOW_SIG is relative and resolves the FIRST rip-load (48 8B 0D), giving the window global @0x141EB4080. Match at 0x14062cdae. Same host also loads ChampionManager elsewhere. PROPOSED name/role; DB stripped as sub_14062ba50.

cfg.note: not_enumerated (large fn); entry prologue captured in byte_sig. Match site 0x14062cdae is interior.

runtime_signature.match: first 'FF 15 ???? 48 8B 05' in .text that also has the '48 8B 0D ????' prefix; resolves g1 (window) @0x141EB4080.

named_neighbors.note: the FF 15 is a call through an IAT import between the two rip-loads.

db_state.note: Large fn; interior match; host params not enumerated.

metadata.name: CharacterDataStack__push_emplace
metadata.prototype: int64_t sub_14022aee0(void* this, void* rdx, int32_t r8, int32_t r9, /* arg5..arg18 on stack */ ...)
metadata.comment: THE CharacterDataStack push/emplace helper (PUSH_FN_SIG, call_target). PUSH_FN_SIG matches a call SITE at 0x1402a3bbd inside sub_1402a3a20 (the change_skin-adjacent offset-donor host) and follows its first E8 here. Stack layout confirms 18 params (rcx/rdx/r8/r9 + arg5..arg18), matching the '16.14 push = 18 args' finding. This is the same emplace helper the offset-donor forwards 17 fields to. PROPOSED name; DB stripped as sub_14022aee0.

cfg.note: not_enumerated (large fn); entry prologue captured in byte_sig.

runtime_signature.match: unique in the change_skin host; first E8 (rel32 0xfff8731e = -0x78ce2) targets 0x14022aee0.

params.note: 14 stack args at rsp+0x28..+0x90; arg12/arg14/arg18 are char* (model strings), arg13/arg15/arg17 int32

metadata.name: translate_string_helper
metadata.comment: String-translate helper (TRANSLATE_STRING_FN_SIG, call_target). Two call sites (0x140367147 in sub_1403670f0, 0x140368672 in sub_1403685a0) both follow their E8 to 0x1411ba5c0. Small rbx-frame fn with byte args; tail-calls another routine. PROPOSED name; DB stripped as sub_1411ba5c0.

runtime_signature.match: 2 call sites, both E8 rel32 target 0x1411ba5c0; scanner takes the first.

metadata.name: gold_redirect_adjustor_thunk
metadata.prototype: void sub_14027b050(void* rcx) /* add rcx, imm32; jmp real */
metadata.comment: GOLD_REDIRECT_FN_SIG (call_target) target: a 2-instruction adjustor thunk 'add rcx,imm32; jmp' (this-pointer adjust then tail-jump). Call SITE at 0x1402248d8 in sub_140224810, where the returned value is compared 'cmp r14,rax; sete al'. Only the '4C 3B F0 0F 94 C0' modrm variant carried a preceding E8. PROPOSED name; DB stripped as sub_14027b050.

runtime_signature.wildcard_free_run_searched: modrm-swept '4C 3B ?? 0F 94 C0'; only F0 (cmp r14,rax) had a preceding E8
runtime_signature.match: E8 rel32 0x00056773 targets 0x14027b050 (adjustor thunk). first-match caveat: not every modrm swept, but the F0 site is the only one with a valid E8 prefix among those checked.

metadata.name: msvc_string_dtor
metadata.comment: The game's MSVC std::string destructor (MSVC_STRING_DTOR_SIG). Pattern matches the dtor's own entry prologue directly (first byte F6, not E8), so resolve() returns the match address as-is. Used by the Lux/Sona chroma clear path (check_special_skins) to free a discarded stack element's model string. 'F6 41 0C 01 74 08 48 8B 09' = test byte[rcx+0xc],1; jz +8; mov rcx,[rcx]; then tail-jmp to free. PROPOSED name; DB stripped as sub_1411a6e20.

cfg.note: entry has TrueBranch->0x1411a6e2e (ret) + FalseBranch->0x1411a6e26 (mov rcx,[rcx]; tail-jmp free). ~15 bytes.

runtime_signature.role: entry_prologue (sub_base, no call-rel32; match address returned as-is)
runtime_signature.match: unique (1 hit); match address == function entry.
